title: Synthetic Skill Runtime Brief
summary: Public-safe synthetic brief for the minimal skill runtime fixture.

title: Support Operations Domain
summary: Synthetic owner domain responsible for the skill boundary and operational judgement.

title: Support Triage Skill
summary: Synthetic skill that classifies requests and prepares governed next actions.

title: Request Classification
summary: Capability for classifying requests by topic, urgency and required owner.

title: Triage Request
summary: Activity that uses the classification capability to prepare a next-action recommendation.

title: No External Write Without Approval
summary: Rule requiring approval before generated context leads to a user-visible or external write.

title: Hybrid Source Boundary
summary: Boundary that keeps raw source material authoritative for domain meaning and sensitive rules.

title: Synthetic Skill Manual
summary: Placeholder raw source that remains authoritative for detailed procedure and judgement.

title: Gate Summary Projection
summary: Projection view exposing readiness, required gates, fallback and next action for the skill.

title: Support Triage Compact Runtime Context
summary: Generated compact context for routing and capability orientation in the declared task scope.

title: Semantic Preservation Gate
summary: Gate checking that generated graph context preserves the meaning and safety boundary of the raw source.

title: Support Triage Semantic Review
summary: Synthetic semantic review artifact for the fixture scope.

title: Support Triage Effectiveness Report
summary: Synthetic effectiveness report comparing baseline and graph-assisted operation.

title: Compact Context Runtime Policy
summary: Policy allowing compact graph context only for measured non-sensitive routing tasks.

title: Raw Source Required Fallback
summary: Fallback requiring raw source review before sensitive, destructive or external actions.

title: Next Owner Handoff
summary: Handoff object that records the next owner and acceptance expectation after graph-assisted triage.

title: GGA7 Candidate Adoption Report
summary: Synthetic adoption report showing staged evidence before federation integration.

title: Support Triage Federation Contract
summary: Placeholder federation contract exposing bounded skill capability and fallback requirements.

title: Update Gate Summary Learning Proposal
summary: Proposal to improve the projection view after reviewed feedback, without automatic canonical update.
